keyFacts: Wrinklers reduce visible CpS while feeding but return more than they wither when popped.
A normal wrinkler drops 1.1x the cookies it withered during its lifespan.
Each empty wrinkler slot has a base respawn rate of 0.001% per Grandmapocalypse stage per frame, or 0.005% with Unholy bait.
__summary.overview: Ten wrinklers feeding off the . Ten wrinklers feeding off the Big Cookie. Twelve wrinklers at the . Twelve wrinklers at the Big Cookie. A wrinkler can be popped, or exploded, by being clicked three consecutive times. The game hints at this property by having a wrinkler continuously shake when hovered over, and in the Grimoire as a backfire in the Ressurect Abomination spell. When exploded, it will drop 1.1 x the total number of cookies withered during its lifespan and may unlock seasonal upgrades. While offline, wrinklers are dormant, and do not wither CpS or collect cookies. The stats menu displays how much of the current CpS is being withered, as well as the number of popped wrinklers in the current ascension. If a wrinkler is popped before reaching the big cookie, it will not drop any cookies or upgrades, but will count towards the "Wrinklers Popped" statistic. If the Grandmatriarchs are appeased, whether via Elder Pledge, Elder Covenant, or by selling all grandmas, all the wrinklers on the screen will automatically be exploded, and will not begin to appear again unless the Grandmapocalypse is restarted.
__summary.spawn: Each empty wrinkler slot has a (re-) spawn rate of 0.001% (0.005% with "Unholy bait") per Grandmapocalypse stage per frame (the usual framerate is 30 fps). The Skruuia, Spirit of Scorn and Garden plants can also alter the rate. factor Grandmapocalypse stage 1/2/3 (One Mind/Communal Brainsweep/Elder Pact) Unholy bait 5 Skruuia, Spirit of Scorn 2.5/2/1.5 (Diamond/Ruby/Jade) Elder Spice +2 wrinkler slots (indirectly boosts spawn rate) Dragon Guts +2 wrinkler slots (indirectly boosts spawn rate) Garden plants 1-(1-0.85^WA)+0.02WR WA = # of Wardlichen WR = # of Wrinklegill For example, if you have unholy bait and 3 Wardlichens in the garden when in Communal Brainsweep stage, the spawn rate will be r= 0.001% * 2 * (1-0.15*3) = 0.0011%. On average, collecting all 12 wrinklers takes: 1 r k = 1 12 1 k = 1 r 86021 27720 {\displaystyle {\frac {1}{r}}\sum _{k=1}^{12}{\frac {1}{k}}={\frac {1}{r}}{\frac {86021}{27720}}} frames 0.10344 r {\displaystyle \approx {\frac {0.10344}{r}}} seconds On average, it takes 57 minutes and 28 seconds (11 minutes 30 seconds with "Unholy bait") for all 12 Elder Pact (speedup factor is 3) wrinklers to spawn, from a starting point of 0 wrinklers. For Communal Brainsweep, it takes 3/2 of that time, about 86 minutes (17 with "Unholy bait"). For One mind this is three times as long, which is about 172 minutes (34 with "Unholy bait").
__summary.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

__meta.schema: Wrinkler mechanics plus related upgrades/achievements keyed by name. Metadata keys begin with __.

Wrinkler overview.Name: Wrinkler overview
Wrinkler overview.description: Ten wrinklers feeding off the . Ten wrinklers feeding off the Big Cookie. Twelve wrinklers at the . Twelve wrinklers at the Big Cookie. A wrinkler can be popped, or exploded, by being clicked three consecutive times. The game hints at this property by having a wrinkler continuously shake when hovered over, and in the Grimoire as a backfire in the Ressurect Abomination spell. When exploded, it will drop 1.1 x the total number of cookies withered during its lifespan and may unlock seasonal upgrades. While offline, wrinklers are dormant, and do not wither CpS or collect cookies. The stats menu displays how much of the current CpS is being withered, as well as the number of popped wrinklers in the current ascension. If a wrinkler is popped before reaching the big cookie, it will not drop any cookies or upgrades, but will count towards the "Wrinklers Popped" statistic. If the Grandmatriarchs are appeased, whether via Elder Pledge, Elder Covenant, or by selling all grandmas, all the wrinklers on the screen will automatically be exploded, and will not begin to appear again unless the Grandmapocalypse is restarted.
Wrinkler overview.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Wrinkler CpS multiplier.Name: Wrinkler CpS multiplier
Wrinkler CpS multiplier.description: Because wrinklers store a percentage of the total wither rate, each additional wrinkler adds a larger bonus than the previous one. The net increase in CpS is 0.5% with one wrinkler, rising to 1008% with a maximum of fourteen. The fourteenth wrinkler alone increases net CpS by more than 143% of the pre-wrinkler base value. To calculate the effective CpS multiplier, assuming N wrinklers present, the formula consists of: (withered CPS for each wrinkler. Each wrinkler hoards 5% times number of wrinklers present. Hoarded cookies are then amplified by a flat factor of 1.1 (10% gain after popping), an additional 1.05 (5% more cookies) with the Easter Season Wrinklerspawn upgrade and additional 1.05 with the Heavenly Sacrilegious corruption upgrade.) (Remaining unwithered CPS) Put together, this is: without wrinkler upgrades. with 1 wrinkler upgrade. with both wrinkler upgrades. From the above formula, we can draw the following CpS conclusion: No. wrinklers CpS Multiplier CpS Multiplier with one of: "Wrinklerspawn" or "Sacrilegious corruption" CpS Multiplier with both: "Wrinklerspawn" and "Sacrilegious corruption" 0 1 1 1 1 1.005 1.00775 1.0106375 2 1.12 1.131 1.14255 3 1.345 1.36975 1.3957375 4 1.68 1.724 1.7702 5 2.125 2.19375 2.2659375 6 2.68 2.779 2.88295 7 3.345 3.47975 3.6212375 8 4.12 4.296 4.4808 9 5.005 5.22775 5.4616375 10 6 6.275 6.56375 11 7.105 7.43775 7.7871375 12 8.32...
Wrinkler CpS multiplier.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

The Skruuia, Spirit of Scorn and Garden plants can also alter the rate. factor Grandmapocalypse stage 1/2/3 (One Mind/Communal Brainsweep/Elder Pact) Unholy bait 5 Skruuia, Spirit of Scorn 2.5/2/1.5 (Diamond/Ruby/Jade) Elder Spice +2 wrinkler slots (indirectly boosts spawn rate) Dragon Guts +2 wrinkler slots (indirectly boosts spawn rate) Garden plants 1-(1-0.85^WA)+0.02WR WA = # of Wardlichen WR = # of Wrinklegill For example, if you have unholy bait and 3 Wardlichens in the garden when in Communal Brainsweep stage, the spawn rate will be r= 0.001% * 2 * (1-0.15*3) = 0.0011%. On average, collecting all 12 wrinklers takes: 1 r k = 1 12 1 k = 1 r 86021 27720 {\displaystyle {\frac {1}{r}}\sum _{k=1}^{12}{\frac {1}{k}}={\frac {1}{r}}{\frac {86021}{27720}}} frames 0.10344 r {\displaystyle \approx {\frac {0.10344}{r}}} seconds On average, it takes 57 minutes and 28 seconds (11 minutes 30 seconds with "Unholy bait") for all 12 Elder Pact (speedup factor is 3) wrinklers to spawn, from a starting point of 0 wrinklers. For Communal Brainsweep, it takes 3/2 of that time, about 86 minutes (17 with "Unholy bait"). For One mind this is three times as long, which is about 172 minutes (34 with "Unholy bait").

Wrinklerspawn.Name: Wrinklerspawn
Wrinklerspawn.description: Wrinklers explode into 5% more cookies. Cost scales with how many eggs you own. "Look at this little guy! It's going to be a big boy someday! Yes it is!"
Wrinklerspawn.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Wrinkler ambergris.Name: Wrinkler ambergris
Wrinkler ambergris.unlock condition: 0.01% chance of dropping after popping a Wrinkler or 0.1% chance for a Shiny Wrinkler [note 1]
Wrinkler ambergris.description: Cookie production multiplier +6%. All upgrades are 1% cheaper. Cost scales with CpS. "Occasionally regurgitated by wrinklers. The byproduct of some obscure metabolic process or other, it is as rare and precious as it is pungent. Makes for a great toast spread."
Wrinkler ambergris.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Unholy bait.Name: Unholy bait
Unholy bait.description: Wrinklers appear 5 times as fast. "No wrinkler can resist the scent of worm biscuits."
Unholy bait.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Sacrilegious corruption.Name: Sacrilegious corruption
Sacrilegious corruption.description: Wrinklers regurgitate 5% more cookies. "Unique in the animal kingdom, the wrinkler digestive tract is able to withstand an incredible degree of dilatation - provided you prod them appropriately."
Sacrilegious corruption.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Elder spice.Name: Elder spice
Elder spice.description: You can attract 2 more wrinklers. "The cookie your cookie could smell like."
Elder spice.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Eye of the wrinkler.Name: Eye of the wrinkler
Eye of the wrinkler.description: Mouse over a wrinkler to see how many cookies are in its stomach. "Just a wrinkler and its will to survive. Hangin' tough, stayin' hungry."
Eye of the wrinkler.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Wrinkler poker.Name: Wrinkler poker
Wrinkler poker.description: Poke a wrinkler 50 times without killing it. "Also the name of a card game popular in retirement homes."
Wrinkler poker.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Itchscratcher.Name: Itchscratcher
Itchscratcher.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Wrinklesquisher.Name: Wrinklesquisher
Wrinklesquisher.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Moistburster.Name: Moistburster
Moistburster.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text

Last Chance to See.Name: Last Chance to See
Last Chance to See.description: Burst the near-extinct shiny wrinkler. "You monster!"
Last Chance to See.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Wrinkler pasted text
